meaning: adv.鐪嬩笉瑙佸湴,鐪嬩笉鍑哄湴
examples: He looked at me and nodded, almost invisibly.
A thin coil of smoke rose almost invisibly into the sharp, bright sky.
Space travel can be so delightful but at the same time invisibly dangerous.
Robbins works smoothly and invisibly, with a diffident charm that belies his talent for larceny.
In the popular mind they became huge beasts, invisibly inhabiting any murky stretch of water.
